turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hello larry how is larry doing today

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: larry has been better larry's primary care doctor wanted larry to see the doctor for this back pain that larry has been having for a couple of years now

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: and larry has tried so many things and just nothing seems to work

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is sorry to hear that now does larry remember what caused the back pain initially

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: larry never fell or was in an accident but larry does remember the back pain started after larry was moving furniture one weekend

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and now can larry describe the back pain for the doctor

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah the back pain feels like a sharp stabbing pain in larry's back and the back pain does go down even down to larry's right leg sometimes all the way down to larry's toe the back pain feels like larry's big toe

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: and larry also feels like larry just ca n't get comfortable which is worse when larry sits down okay yeah

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay now with the back pain does larry have any numbness or tingling associated with larry's back pain

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah larry does get some numbness and tingling especially to larry's right leg that goes down to larry's foot

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: let larry separate these

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and how about a loss of sensation in the genital or the rectal area

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no nothing like a loss of sensation in the genital or the rectal area

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay now does larry have any weakness

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: larry would n't say larry has any weakness no

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay does larry experience like any loss of control of larry's bladder or larry's bowels

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay now the doctor mentioned earlier that larry larry has some tried tried some things in the past so tell the doctor what were the things larry tried

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so larry's tried some physical therapy before and so when larry's back pain gets really bad larry's doctors have even had to prescribe some strong pain medications for larry but the strong pain medications were only temporary and larry's doctors even mentioned surgery to larry in the past but larry really would like to avoid surgery

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay sure so tell the doctor what is larry's day like

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: larry's day so larry tries to be as active as larry can but of course larry's back pain has made being active difficult and so because of larry's back pain larry has gained some weight over the past years

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay alright well the doctor is sorry to hear that the doctor knows that larry used to like playing golf

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah larry and you know golf is relatively new for larry larry's been trying to get into golf but larry's back pain has definitely set larry back

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah the doctor is sorry yep probably now at the peak of larry you know just learning golf and being able to do more with golf larry's back pain comes and larry's back pain happens right

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: exactly

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: well let's see what the doctor and larry can do for larry here so larry can go out into the you know the golf course again now do larry tell the doctor does larry have any family members with spine conditions

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no larry ca n't recall any family members

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay alright and does larry smoke

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: not now larry quit about twenty years ago

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay alright well alright well the doctor likes to do a quick physical exam on larry here

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is gon na go ahead here the doctor reviewed larry's vitals and larry's vitals overall look pretty good so that's a good sign now on larry's musculoskeletal back exam there is no overlying erythema and erythema just means redness or ecchymosis and ecchymosis just means bruising of the skin now there is midline tenderness at l4 l5 disk space with right-sided lumbar paravertebral tenderness so do the doctor a favor and the doctor is gon na just have larry you know bend forward and straighten up a bit

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay that is painful

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: sorry so definitely some pain with lumbar flexion and supine straight leg test is positive so on larry's neurological examination there is decreased sensation to light touch at the right lateral thigh at l4 dermatome okay and the doctor is just gon na take a look at larry's knees here real quick and then larry's ankles so patellar and achilles reflexes are symmetrical so good now the doctor reviewed the results of larry's mri and larry's mri shows disk herniation with nerve impingement so let the doctor tell larry about the doctor's assessment and plan here larry so for larry's problem of chronic lumbar back pain so based on larry's symptoms larry's exam and reviewing larry's mri results larry's symptoms are consistent with an l4 l5 herniated disk with radicul radiculopathy so this means that one of larry's disks that sits between larry's spinal vertebrae is bulging out and this bulge is pinching on some nerves and that's why larry feels that tingling in larry's leg so yeah yeah so the doctor is recommending a spinal injection with a strong inflammatory medication called a corticosteroid and what the doctor does is the doctor will inject the corticosteroid into that lumbar spine under fluoroscopy which larry can think of you know an x-ray to help localize to the exact area of larry's pain now the spinal injection should the spinal injection should help the inflammation that is causing the pain so what does larry think about the spinal injection

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: is there something larry is gon na have to do all the time

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: well you know patients are different so what the doctor and larry do is the doctor and larry will monitor larry and the doctor and larry see how larry responds to the injection and the patient's intervals can be different as well but the doctor and larry usually do not do the injection more than four times a year

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay okay

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright and the spinal injection is not a long procedure the spinal injection is it's relatively quick and common and larry should be out of the office within an hour

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: alright sounds good

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright well let's go ahead and get larry started on the first spinal injection today if starting the first spinal injection today works for larry if not the doctor will get larry scheduled to start larry's first spinal injection

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: alright thank the doctor

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright thank larry

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: bye
